description: Administrative Unit scoping Helpdesk Administrator role to Tier-1 support users only. Prevents over-privileged help desk accounts from managing executives or other admins.

administrativeUnit.description: Tier-1 Helpdesk support scope - Helpdesk Admins manage only members of this AU

members.notes: Assign a security group rather than individual users to simplify management

notes: Using dynamic membership for the AU itself requires Entra ID P2. Use assigned membership with Entra ID P1.
